reference: EVER SINCE THIS ADVENTURE I HAVE HAD SO GREAT A BELIEF IN ALL THINGS OF THIS NATURE THAT I COULD NOT FORBEAR LAYING A PEAS COD WITH NINE PEAS IN'T UNDER MY DOOR YESTERDAY AND WAS INFORMED BY IT THAT MY HUSBAND'S NAME SHOULD BE THOMAS HOW DO YOU LIKE THAT
text: ever since this adventure i have had so great a belief in all things of this nature that i could not forbear laying a pease-cart with nine peas in't under my door yesterday and was informed by it that my husband's name should be thomas how do you like that
